risk_title: Conflict-related implementation challenges in Tigray region
risk_summary: Post-conflict environment in Tigray is affecting project implementation, requiring adapted modalities and ongoing security considerations for service delivery.
evidence_quote: the modality was changed due to challenges after the conflict

risk_title: Refugee mobility and security issues impacting RHISN implementation
risk_summary: Difficulties in tracing refugees due to mobility and security issues are delaying livelihood grant disbursement and program enrollment in refugee-hosting areas.
evidence_quote: difficulties in tracing certain refugees due to mobility and security issues

risk_title: Displacement pressures affecting urban refugee targeting in Addis Ababa
risk_summary: Lack of accurate refugee data for out-of-camp refugees in Addis Ababa is delaying implementation planning for youth employment and RHISN components under the second additional financing.
evidence_quote: the mission noted lack of accurately recorded refugee data (particularly urban refugees) on 2nd AF cities, delaying the finalization of quota allocation across 2nd AF locations

risk_title: Hazardous items and explosives impeding public works in conflict-affected areas
risk_summary: Removal of hazardous items and explosives is required before public work implementation can proceed in conflict-affected regions, creating implementation delays.
evidence_quote: Removal of Hazardous items & explosives impeding the implementation of public work

risk_title: IDP caseload and targeting challenges affecting emergency response
risk_summary: Implementation of IDP support in Tigray and Somali regions faces challenges in finalizing city selection and determining appropriate support modalities for displaced populations.
evidence_quote: a revision of the implementation plan for 2AF is required, and the selection of cities that will receive support for carrying out small infrastructure projects needs to be finalized

risk_title: Governance fragility affecting institutional coordination and implementation
risk_summary: Limited institutional linkages between implementing ministries and stakeholders, particularly in emerging regions and cities, are weakening project governance and coordination.
evidence_quote: Limited Institutional linkage between implementing ministries and stakeholders, especially at the emerging regions and city level

risk_title: Staff turnover undermining project implementation capacity
risk_summary: High staff turnover in critical positions (procurement, financial management, project management) due to low remuneration is reducing implementation capacity and institutional continuity.
evidence_quote: the project faced significant staff turnover. In the last year, more than 20 critical staff (Procurement, Financial Management, and Project Management) left the project due to low remuneration and salary
